executive_summary: Recommended is selected as the balanced capture build: full coverage, controlled data rate, useful 4DGS overlap, and fewer mountability gaps than Premium. Lean is the laptop preflight baseline; Premium is reserved for occlusion-heavy action.

overlap_policy.redundant: 5+ cameras only when near-identical azimuth/elevation views add little parallax

layouts.Name: Lean 16-Camera Preflight
MoveSuggestions: No camera move required. Preserve useful overlap; do not remove cameras solely because they overlap.
SensorRollNotes: Do not roll every camera 90°. Use selected rolled cameras to improve vertical body coverage while keeping landscape views for horizontal parallax.
Performer envelope is human-height; selected portrait cameras are useful for head-to-toe coverage.
layouts.IntendedUse: Fast synthetic preflight layout for a laptop workflow.

layouts.Name: Recommended 24-Camera Two-Tier Ring
MoveSuggestions: No camera move required. Preserve useful overlap; do not remove cameras solely because they overlap.
SensorRollNotes: Do not roll every camera 90°. Use selected rolled cameras to improve vertical body coverage while keeping landscape views for horizontal parallax.
Performer envelope is human-height; selected portrait cameras are useful for head-to-toe coverage.
layouts.IntendedUse: Balanced layout intended for most 4DGS preproduction decisions.

layouts.Name: Premium 36-Camera Dense Ring
MoveSuggestions: No camera move required. Preserve useful overlap; do not remove cameras solely because they overlap.
SensorRollNotes: Do not roll every camera 90°. Use selected rolled cameras to improve vertical body coverage while keeping landscape views for horizontal parallax.
Performer envelope is human-height; selected portrait cameras are useful for head-to-toe coverage.
layouts.IntendedUse: Default NOZ Stage #1 production array: 36 KOMODO-X cameras at roughly 12–13 ft with 24mm Rokinon lenses.
